assessment.note: He names the absence of clear recognition criteria rather than reassurance, signaling a mild negative growth signal; also reveals a strong clarity issue, but clarity was off-signature.

new_queue.label: Arrive here
new_queue.name: Before we go further, what feels most important to put on the table today?
